summary: Many investors believe that tax-free long-term capital gains also mean they can skip filing an income tax return. Experts say the ₹1.25 lakh exemption under Section 112A only determines tax liability, not whether ITR filing is mandatory.

summary: EPFO has introduced a three-day timeline for settling eligible PF claims as part of a broader overhaul of its services. The reforms also simplify withdrawals, expand auto-settlement and pave the way for more digital member services.

summary: Clarity on TDS on rent paid to joint owners shows the ₹50,000 threshold applies per landlord, not per property. Joint ownership rent splits decide tax deduction, ensuring accurate compliance under Section 194IB and avoiding unnecessary deductions.

title: ICICI Bank mulls first benchmark dollar bond sale since 2017
summary: ICICI Bank is planning its first benchmark US dollar bond sale since 2017, aiming to raise at least $500 million through offshore bonds.
